Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 0 25 25}I was asking the teacher about something I didn't understand in class.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}But then it led to even more questions, so I was stuck there for a while.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Ugh, this is so heavy. I shouldn't have crammed everything in there...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Nope, they're reference books.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}There were so many things I wanted to ask, I ended up bringing the books for every subject.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}Nah, it's okay! I'll just think of it as weight training.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Still, I can't believe how heavy these textbooks are! Students all over the world have it rough.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Whenever I come to this field, I get so nostalgic.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}It hasn't even been that long since we coached those kids though, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}You said it. I had to really put my brains and body to work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I've never had to run around like that, not even for the track team.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Hey! You don't have to word it like that![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}You could just say I've grown up or matured. Come on, now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I obtained the item (ITEM NAME)![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}It's from those kids. They told me to "make sure I give it to {f 4 1}-san."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Yeah, they usually just called you "Coach" or "Boyfriend," huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}I got one too. They told me they would "never forget their Auntie."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I'll be sure to let the kids know you liked it. They'll be super happy to hear.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}...When you get something like this, it makes you forget how tough it was in the moment.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Kinda makes me wanna do it all again. What about you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 0 25 25}Oh, but I would like more people to help out next time. It was pretty hard with just the two of us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Huh? Me? Well, yeah, I guess I do want to.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Next time, we should get more people to help coach though. It was pretty tough with just the two of us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Once I'm caught up on school, I'd like to take some time to think. Not just about coaching, but about enjoying life and stuff too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 1 25 25}Hehe, I can hardly wait. All right, time to study like hell![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 0 25 25}...Oh, let me know when you figure out what you wanna do for your future too, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}If you decide on something similar, maybe we could even study together![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko and I talked for a long time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel a strong bond with Yuko...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_021_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Strength Social Link reached its maximum level! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Atavaka{f 0 1 27}, the wisdom king general![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Oh, look at the time. I need to go buy some reference books.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After saying goodbye to Yuko,[n]I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 0 25 25}I was asking the teacher about something I didn't understand in class.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}But then it led to even more questions, so I was stuck there for a while.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Ugh, this is so heavy. I shouldn't have crammed everything in there...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Nope, they're reference books.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}There were so many things I wanted to ask, I ended up bringing the books for every subject.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}Nah, it's okay! I'll just think of it as weight training.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Still, I can't believe how heavy these textbooks are! Students all over the world have it rough.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Whenever I come to this field, I get so nostalgic.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}It hasn't even been that long since we coached those kids though, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}You said it. I had to really put my brains and body to work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I've never had to run around like that, not even for the track team.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Hey! You don't have to word it like that![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}You could just say I've grown up or matured. Come on, now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I obtained the item (ITEM NAME)![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}It's from those kids. They told me to "make sure I give it to my boyfriend."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}I've told them over and over that it's not true, but they just don't listen.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}You and me as a couple... Really, kids have such wild imaginations.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}I got one too. They told me they would "never forget their Auntie."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}I mean, isn't that pretty unusual for you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 1 25 25}Anyways, I'll be sure to let the kids know you liked it. They'll be super happy to hear.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}...When you get something like this, it makes you forget how tough it was in the moment.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}Kinda makes me wanna do it all again. What about you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 0 25 25}Oh, and while we're at it, we should invite more people to coach with us next time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}...I don't think I could handle it on my own though.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 0 25 25}It was hard enough with just the two of us... Maybe I should invite more people to coach with us next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}Once I'm caught up on school, I'd like to take some time to think. Not just about coaching, but about enjoying life and stuff too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 1 25 25}I hope you can wait for me until then! I'll make sure I study hard.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}If I do manage to become an athletic trainer...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}My first job will be putting together a training routine for you, {f 4 1}-kun![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}You probably won't become a pro athlete, so I'll try not to make it too intense.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko and I talked for a long time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel a strong bond with Yuko...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 68 0 0}Whoa, look at the time! I gotta go buy some reference books![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After saying goodbye to Yuko,[n]I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
